# Grimasso — Myofunctional Therapy App for Children
> iOS app with scientifically-designed tongue and oral muscle training exercises. Developed by Lorenz Maierhofer.

Grimasso helps children aged 4+ improve speech clarity, correct tongue thrust, and strengthen oral muscles through playful gamified exercises. Recommended by speech-language pathologists (SLPs).

## App Features
- 51 exercises across 5 categories (tongue strength, mobility, coordination, lip/jaw, swallowing)
- 20 levels, 25+ achievement badges, streak tracking
- Parent dashboard with progress tracking
- Free to download on iOS
- Evidence-based myofunctional therapy approach
- GDPR compliant
